footer.basedOnWork: Basado en el trabajo del Dr. Alexander Parkhomov

privacy.title: Configuración de privacidad
privacy.bannerMessage: Este sitio utiliza análisis respetuosos con la privacidad para mejorar su experiencia. Sus datos nunca salen de su dispositivo sin consentimiento.
privacy.analyticsDescription: Ayúdenos a mejorar el sitio permitiendo estadísticas de uso anónimas
privacy.errorReportingDescription: Informar errores automáticamente para ayudarnos a corregir bugs más rápido

errors.databaseError: Ocurrió un error de base de datos
errors.networkError: Error de red. Por favor, verifique su conexión.
errors.contactSupport: Si el problema persiste, por favor contacte al soporte

home.title: The Nanosoft Package
home.subtitle: Interactive tools for exploring Low Energy Nuclear Reactions (LENR) and cold fusion transmutation pathways
home.basedOn: Based on the groundbreaking work of Dr. Alexander Parkhomov

queryReactions.title: Query Nuclear Reactions
queryReactions.description: Search through thousands of exothermic fusion, fission, and two-to-two nuclear transmutation reactions

cascadeSimulations.title: Cascade Simulations
cascadeSimulations.description: Model chain reactions and predict reaction products from cascading LENR processes

elementData.title: Element & Nuclide Data
elementData.description: Browse comprehensive tables of nuclear and chemical properties

advancedQueries.title: Advanced Queries
advancedQueries.description: Execute custom SQL queries across all reaction and property tables

parkhomovTables.title: About the Parkhomov Tables
parkhomovTables.intro: This package is based on the pioneering work of Russian physicist Dr. Alexander Parkhomov, who published comprehensive tables of possible cold nuclear transmutation reactions in 2018.
parkhomovTables.analysisIntro: Using computer analysis of 280 stable nuclides, Dr. Parkhomov identified:
parkhomovTables.twoToTwoCount: 516,789 two-to-two reactions - transforming pairs of nuclides
parkhomovTables.exothermicNote: All reactions in these tables are exothermic (energy-producing) and represent thermodynamically favorable pathways for nuclear transmutation at low energies.
parkhomovTables.developers: Developed by R.W. Greenyer and P.W. Power for the Martin Fleischmann Memorial Project

originalApp.title: Original Application
originalApp.description: This is a modern reimplementation of the original Nanosoft Package, which was developed as a PHP web application to explore Dr. Parkhomov's nuclear transmutation tables.
originalApp.findAt: The original application and comprehensive documentation can be found at:
originalApp.gratitude: We are grateful to R. W. Greenyer and P. W. Power for their pioneering work in making this important research accessible.

openSource.title: Open Source Project
openSource.description: This project is open source and licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 (AGPL-3.0). We welcome contributions, bug reports, and feature requests from the community.

cascades.title: Cascadas
cascades.description: Explore cascadas de reacciones y rutas

updates.appUpdateMessage: Actualice ahora para obtener las últimas funciones y mejoras
